title: Moon Info Updated
description: Minecraft mod to display information about the state of the moon
body:
## **Minecraft mod to display information about the state of the moon**

This mod complements the MoonPhaseInfo mod with the ability to change the position of the icon right in the game (F6 key)

This is an updated version for 1.21.1 of the same mod by yanvaa [https://modrinth.com/mod/moon-info](https://modrinth.com/mod/moon-info)
